summary: Iteration 18: RFP Export Functionality Testing. Backend export endpoint (/api/rfp/export) fully tested with 28 passing tests for DOCX and PDF formats. Both export formats return valid files with proper Content-Type headers, file signatures, professional formatting including Table of Contents, styled headings, and inline citations. Frontend RFP Generator component has complete Export dropdown UI with data-testid attributes for both Word and PDF options.

minor.issue: PDF export returns 500 for Arabic content - FPDF doesn't support Arabic text natively. Consider adding unicode support or fallback.

integration_issues.issue: Frontend shows '0 Indexed Sources' in workspace despite sources existing in MongoDB default notebook. This prevents opening Studio tools. API calls succeed but state not reflected in UI.
integration_issues.priority: MEDIUM - blocking E2E UI test but backend API tests confirm functionality

passed_tests: Backend: Export endpoint exists and accepts POST requests
Backend: Invalid format ('invalid') returns 400 with proper error message
Backend: Empty sections array handled gracefully
Backend: DOCX export returns 200 OK
Backend: DOCX has correct Content-Type (application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document)
Backend: DOCX has Content-Disposition header with .docx filename
Backend: DOCX file size is non-zero (>1000 bytes)
Backend: DOCX has valid ZIP/DOCX signature (PK header)
Backend: DOCX is readable by python-docx library
Backend: DOCX contains project name
Backend: DOCX contains client name
Backend: DOCX contains section headings (Executive Summary, Project Objectives)
Backend: DOCX contains Table of Contents
Backend: PDF export returns 200 OK
Backend: PDF has correct Content-Type (application/pdf)
Backend: PDF has Content-Disposition header with .pdf filename
Backend: PDF file size is non-zero (>500 bytes)
Backend: PDF has valid signature (%PDF-)
Backend: PDF contains extractable text
Backend: PDF contains project name elements
Backend: PDF has multiple pages (multipage format)
Backend: Special characters in project name handled
Backend: Empty source names handled
Backend: Long content handled
Backend: Many sections (12) handled
Backend: DOCX filename contains project name
Backend: PDF filename contains project name
Frontend Code Review: Export dropdown button has data-testid='rfp-export-btn'
Frontend Code Review: Export menu has data-testid='rfp-export-menu'
Frontend Code Review: DOCX option has data-testid='rfp-export-docx'
Frontend Code Review: PDF option has data-testid='rfp-export-pdf'
Frontend Code Review: exportFile() function calls /api/rfp/export with correct format parameter
action_items: OPTIONAL: Add Unicode/Arabic font support to PDF export (fpdf2 requires explicit Unicode font registration)
INVESTIGATE: Frontend workspace shows 0 sources despite API returning 6 sources - may be caching or state management issue
critical_code_review_comments: Backend server.py (lines 1378-1700): Export functionality well implemented with _export_docx() and _export_pdf() helper functions
Backend: DOCX uses python-docx with proper styling (Calibri font, professional colors, Table of Contents)
Backend: PDF uses fpdf2 with custom RFPPDF class for headers/footers
Backend: Both formats include inline citation styling ([Source: name · §section] rendered in purple)
Backend: StreamingResponse used correctly for file downloads
Frontend RFPGenerator.jsx (lines 173-209): Export functionality with dropdown menu, handles both formats
Frontend: Proper data-testid attributes on all export UI elements
Frontend: Download triggered via blob URL with correct filename

success_rate.frontend: Partial - UI code review verified, E2E blocked by workspace state issue

seed_data_creation: None needed - export tests use provided section data
context_for_next_testing_agent: RFP Export feature is complete and working. Backend /api/rfp/export endpoint tested thoroughly with 28 passing tests. Frontend has Export dropdown with Word and PDF options. The workspace may show 0 sources on fresh load - this is a state/caching issue but doesn't affect backend functionality. To test frontend E2E: ensure workspace has sources loaded, navigate to Studio > RFP Generator > Use Sample Template > Configure > Generate > Preview > Export dropdown.

verified_requirements.docx_has_proper_headings: VERIFIED - Heading1 style with teal color
verified_requirements.docx_has_title_page: VERIFIED - Project name, client, date, sources

export_api_example.response: StreamingResponse with appropriate Content-Type and Content-Disposition headers
